📡Change Risk Radar
🔴 Live DemoObservatory⚡ Detectors📊 Stats🚀 Early Access
Phase 1 — Customer Discovery

Hypothesis Grid

Our working assumptions across ICPs, problems, value propositions, go-to-market channels, and pricing. Updated as we learn from customer conversations.

📅 Last updated: January 2025 · Version 0.1

🎯 Ideal Customer Profiles (ICPs)

🛒primary

E-commerce Growth Teams

DTC or marketplace brands with $1M–$50M ARR using Shopify + Stripe + logistics tools, growing fast, lean ops team.

KEY TOOLS
ShopifyStripeShipBobKlaviyoMeta AdsGoogle Ads
PAIN POINTS
  • • Shopify checkout changes break conversion flows overnight
  • • Stripe fee changes silently erode margins
  • • Klaviyo email policy changes affect deliverability
  • • No one tracks vendor ToS changes proactively
🔧primary

B2B SaaS Ops/Engineering

SaaS companies with 10–200 employees where engineering or ops owns the vendor stack. AWS, GitHub, Stripe, Twilio.

KEY TOOLS
AWSGitHubStripeTwilioOktaDatadogPagerDuty
PAIN POINTS
  • • AWS API deprecations discovered only when things break
  • • Okta auth changes cause production incidents
  • • Twilio messaging policy updates affect deliverability
  • • No single source of truth for vendor change risk
🏢secondary

Multi-Client Agencies

Digital agencies managing 10–50 client tech stacks. Need to monitor tools across all clients for risk.

KEY TOOLS
ShopifyGoogle WorkspaceMeta AdsHubSpotMailchimpWooCommerce
PAIN POINTS
  • • Can't track vendor changes across 30+ client stacks
  • • Meta Ads policy changes impact campaign performance
  • • Google Workspace changes affect client workflows
  • • Client discovery of issues before agency = trust damage
⚖️secondary

CFO/Finance-Led Compliance

Finance or legal teams at mid-market companies who own SaaS spend and compliance risk.

KEY TOOLS
StripeQuickBooksXeroChargebeeSalesforceDocuSign
PAIN POINTS
  • • Payment processor fee changes hit P&L without warning
  • • Accounting tool API changes break automated reporting
  • • ToS updates create undetected compliance exposure
  • • No audit trail of when vendor terms changed
🚀tertiary

Startup CTOs

Technical co-founders at seed-to-Series A startups managing a full modern stack.

KEY TOOLS
VercelSupabaseStripeAWSGitHubCloudflare
PAIN POINTS
  • • Too busy to read every vendor changelog
  • • Pricing changes hit burn rate without notice
  • • Security policy changes create audit failures

❗ Problem Hypotheses

Problem StatementEvidenceSeverityValidation Status
Companies discover vendor changes reactively—only when something breaks or costs spike.Validated by Stripe's 2024 checkout update impacting 40% of integrations; most learned via support tickets.criticalhypothesis
No tool exists that monitors multiple vendor changelogs and classifies changes by business risk.Market research shows only point solutions (AWS Health, Stripe Dashboard) per vendor, no cross-vendor risk layer.highhypothesis
Pricing and ToS changes are the most damaging but least tracked category of vendor change.Legal/finance teams rarely have engineering bandwidth to monitor API docs; changelog RSS feeds bury pricing changes.highhypothesis
Operations teams lack a shared view of vendor change risk across the whole stack.Information silos: eng tracks API docs, finance tracks invoices, legal reviews ToS manually once a year.highhypothesis
API deprecations cost mid-market companies average $47K per incident in emergency engineering.Based on Gartner 2023 report on unplanned technical debt; specific to SaaS API dependency failures.criticalto-validate
Security policy changes from vendors (e.g., Okta, Auth0) create undiscovered compliance gaps.Okta 2022/2023 incidents where customers were unaware of scope changes until breach disclosure.criticalhypothesis
Agencies waste significant time manually checking vendor updates for clients.Agency workflows rely on ad-hoc monitoring (RSS + bookmarks); no systematized tracking.mediumto-validate

💎 Value Proposition Hypotheses

⚡

Early warning, plain English

All ICPs

Instead of reading 20 changelogs, get one daily digest of changes that matter to YOUR stack—written in business language, not developer jargon.

Confidence: high
💰

Pricing & margin protection

E-commerce + CFO

Be the first to know when Stripe, PayPal, or Shopify change fees. Model the impact before it hits your P&L.

Confidence: high
🔒

Security posture awareness

B2B SaaS + CTOs

When Okta, AWS, or GitHub change authentication or permission requirements, know before it becomes a vulnerability or audit failure.

Confidence: medium
📋

Compliance & legal risk detection

CFO/Legal

Automatic ToS and privacy policy diff tracking. Know when your vendor agreements change and what clauses shifted.

Confidence: medium
🏢

Multi-client risk dashboard

Agencies

Single pane of glass for all client tool stacks. Be the hero who warns clients before changes hurt their business.

Confidence: medium
🔗

Cross-vendor risk correlation

B2B SaaS

When Stripe + Shopify both change webhook formats in the same sprint, you need to know they interact. We surface correlated risks.

Confidence: low

📣 Go-to-Market Channel Hypotheses

💼primary

LinkedIn Founder Outreach

Direct outreach to CTOs, Heads of Engineering, VP Ops at Series A–C SaaS companies with known Stripe/AWS/Shopify dependencies.

Cost: Time onlyTime: 1–2 weeks
🗺️primary

Hacker News (Show HN / comments)

Post the Observatory as a free public tool. HN audience matches ICP-2 (SaaS eng) perfectly.

Cost: Time onlyTime: 1 day
📝primary

SEO Content (Vendor Change Coverage)

Publish plain-English summaries of every major vendor change. Rank for '[vendor] api changes 2025' queries.

Cost: LowTime: 4–8 weeks
🐦secondary

Twitter/X Tech Community

Tweet notable vendor changes as discovered. Build following among dev/ops audience by being first to surface changes.

Cost: Time onlyTime: 2–4 weeks
💬secondary

Slack/Discord Communities

Indie Hackers, SaaS founders Slack groups, Shopify Partners community. Share observatory updates.

Cost: Time onlyTime: 1–2 weeks
🤝tertiary

Agency & Consultant Partnerships

Partner with Shopify partners and AWS consulting partners. Revenue share on referrals.

Cost: MediumTime: 4–8 weeks

💰 Pricing Hypotheses

Starter

$99/mo

SMBs and indie hackers will pay $99/mo for monitoring 10 tools with weekly email digests.

ICP: Startup CTOs
WTP Signal: Need 5 customer interviews to validate
Status: hypothesis

Growth

$299/mo

Growth-stage SaaS teams will pay $299/mo for real-time Slack alerts + API access + 30 tools.

ICP: B2B SaaS Ops
WTP Signal: Need 10 customer interviews + 10 deposits to validate
Status: hypothesis

Enterprise

Custom

$2,000–$5,000/mo for enterprises needing unlimited tools, SSO, and compliance reporting.

ICP: Enterprise Ops/Finance
WTP Signal: Need 3 enterprise conversations to validate
Status: hypothesis
